title: Catalytic
description: This is the Catalytic converter for your computer! This modpack is aimed to convert low fps to high fps while maintaining a few fancy visuals.
body:
Catalytic is built to achieve high performance, with the main motive being FPS with very little visual enhancements (few additional mods see detail below in 'Additonal section'). Catalytic has been tested on a low-end computer and a high-end computer, both achieving excellent performance.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

 **High-end computer specs:**
 
- AMD Ryzen 5 5600g with Radeon Graphics
 
- Nvidia Geforce RTX 2060 Super
 
- Memory 16gb ram
 
- 12 Render Distance used in Minecraft settings

 **Low-end computer specs:**
 
 - Intel core i5 11th gen
 
 - Integrated graphics (Intel(R) Iris(R) Xe Graphics)
 
 - Memory 8gb ram
 
 - 12 Render Distance used in Minecraft settings

-----

**Additional:**

Credits: iLofiz (The Mod Icon And High End PC Specs)

There are a few additional mods(only in 1.21 version) such as Simple Voice Chat, Essential And Better F3, you can remove those mods from the modpack if its affecting your performance.
